meta.methodology: Policy briefs are generated from aggregated RSS feed alerts. LLM-assisted summaries use GPT-4o-mini when OPENAI_API_KEY is set; otherwise rule-based summaries are produced from headline aggregation.

briefs.title: Affordable Housing Policy Brief — March 2026
briefs.summary: Recent news coverage on affordable housing in Colorado covers 62 item(s). Notable headlines include: Colorado's push for affordable housing continues as Gov. Polis signs HOME Act, workforce housing bill - Colorado Politics; Bill to Create More Affordable Housing Opportunities Passes Colorado House - Ark Valley Voice; 6 Affordable Housing Proposals Receive Support from Austin City Council for Competitive LIHTC Funding Applications - austintexas.gov. Coverage spans: Colorado, Statewide.
briefs.implications: Policymakers should monitor affordable housing trends in Colorado. This data cluster suggests active public discourse and potential legislative or market developments.
